title: Caccia all'uomo
writer: Riccardo Freda, Victor Hugo, Mario Monicelli
actors: Gino Cervi, Valentina Cortese, Hans Hinrich
plot: Jean Valjean, pursued through the years for a minor infraction by the implacable policeman Javert, attempts to create a life for himself and for his adopted daughter Cosette amid the revolutionary struggles of France.
